instruction: The Sydney release setup should already be ready. Just verify the current model, the next-step task on the board, and the sync on the calendar before you send alice@example.com a short recap without rebuilding anything.
canonical_instruction: I think the Sydney release setup is already in good shape. Please verify the current model, the next-step task on the board, and the sync on the calendar before you send alice@example.com a short recap and leave it alone if it is already right.
